name: unslop
description: Edit LLM-generated documents to remove telltale signs of AI writing (per Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing"): AI vocabulary, negative parallelisms, rule of three, promotional tone, vague attributions, throat-clearing, fake-profound kickers, formatting slop. Polish and English. Ships a SessionStart hook that applies the style to all agent prose (disable by creating .claude/unslop-off).
